all: key 'retrys' is not in $local_cfg's literal shape

rows.note: The deliberate local-literal typo; the whole-story gate keeps every other var silent (and the substrate at zero unknown-hash-key).

all: key 'db_host' is not in $config's literal shape

rows.note: GAP: $config's shape comes from the cfg() import; publish_diagnostics enriches open docs before collect_diagnostics, but batch_diagnostics walks raw workspace entries -- no enrichment parity, so cross-file-typed shapes can't hint in batch.
